title: How to make a "Project Report" board view that includes dashboard widgets
excerpt:

posts.author: VicH (Vic)
posts.cookedHtml:
On the “Advance Project Management” template the Project Plan board has a view on it called “project report” that looks and works like a dashboard, including all the widgets normally only available on a dashboard.

How do you create this from scratch? Since it’s apparently not possible to make a template of a dashboard I’m interested in being able to incorporate this into an overall board template for the multiple projects I run.

Help please!

image1210×671 26.5 KB

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @VicH , have you tried workspace templates? Pro and enterprise plans now have this function:

You can now create a workspace template so you can easily recreate the same exact Workspace structure (filled with boards, dashboards, Workforms, and more!)
